pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with Spring Boot 3 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to enforce compilation against the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17 as the minimum runtime; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency management for com.sun.mail:jakarta.mail to resolve version conflicts in the Jakarta EE ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit management, transitive dependencies might pull in incompatible javax.mail or older jakarta.mail versions, leading to runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to replace the removed javax.mail API in Java 17/Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.mail API was removed from the JDK and Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; code referencing mail APIs will fail to compile or run without this dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old springdoc-openapi-ui artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE namespaces, causing compilation errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from okhttp dependency to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
Remove explicit version from com.sun.mail:jakarta.mail dependency to let the newly added dependencyManagement manage it.
Update spring-boot-maven-plugin version to match the new Spring Boot parent version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched plugin and parent versions can lead to build failures or incorrect application packaging.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3 (which runs on Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace verbose @RequestMapping annotation with the more specific @PostMapping composed annotation.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Migrate JPA AttributeConverter import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Java 17/Spring Boot 3 environments where dependencies use the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence import with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 environments, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) for the PostConstruct annotation.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace javax.mail imports with jakarta.mail imports to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.mail does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and thread-safety.
Add import for java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom to support the new random number generation logic.
Replace javax.mail import with jakarta.mail to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The javax.mail package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile error 'package javax.mail does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble() for better concurrency performance.
